<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Util\Http; use function file_get_contents; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @codeCoverageIgnore */ final class PhpDownloader implements Downloader { /** * @param non-empty-string $url */ public function download(string $url): false|string { return file_get_contents($url); } }
